prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约3990名→5045名→4568名→4256名→5663名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近两年波动幅度加大；2025年基准位次约5663名，较 2024年后移约1407名，为近五年最大单年降幅；福州大学在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2026年连续6年均为14人，计划完全持平，无扩招或缩招信号；在考生规 模持续扩大的背景下，计划不变意味着竞争比例进一步收紧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 福州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在77–81名区间（2026年第 77名），属于中上游211院校，综合实力稳健；2024年曾出现校园安全类偏负面舆情（校内猥亵事件），但未形成持续性影响；抖音综合热度排名第88位，评价 为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中化学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生 专业中电子信息类对应一级学科为信息与通信工程/电子科学与技术（未获A类评级），车辆工程对应机械工程（未获A类评级），土木工程对应土木工程（未获A类评级），人文地 理与城乡规划对应地理学（未获A类评级），整体优势学科与招生专业匹配度有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类专业社会热度为"高热推荐"，是当前工科报考热门方向， 对位次有上推作用；土木工程社会热度为"分化观望"至"明显劝退"，对位次有下拉作用；海南省考生总数从2021年约5.3万持续增长至2025年约6.7万，2026年预估约7.8万（增长 约15.7%），竞争压力显著加大，整体平稳略升；福州大学位于福建省，与海南省同属华南地区，地理距离 适中，跨省报考接受度较高；该校在海南省招生占比极小（14人/全校总计划），属外省招生规模较小的院校，受本省考生规模波动影响相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 位次已大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生规模持续快速增长（约+15.7%）以及电子信息类专业热度上推等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，位次继续小幅 后移。预测最低位次约5713名，区间5213–6213名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 车辆工程
- 人文地理与城乡规划
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间下限（约5213名）附近可重点冲刺一档电子信息类专业，该专业为当前工科高热方向，就业前景良好；位次在区间中段（约5500–5900名）建议以二档车辆工程和 人文地理与城乡规划为主攻方向，兼顾稳妥；位次在区间上限（约6200名）附近建议以三档土木工程保底，该专业虽社会热度偏低但录取机会较大。整体采用冲一档、稳二档、保 三档的策略。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Province Comprehensive category were approximately 3990 → 5045 → 4568 → 4256 → 5663, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with increased volatility in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5663, which is about 1407 places lower than 2024, the largest single-year decline in five years; Fuzhou University's enrollment plan for Hainan Province Comprehensive category has been consistently 14 students for six consecutive years from 2021 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction signals; against the backdrop of continuously expanding candidate numbers, unchanged plan means further tightening of competition ratio.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, with stable rankings in the 77–81 range on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (77th in 2026), belonging to mid-to-upper tier 211 universities with solid comprehensive strength; in 2024, there was a negative campus safety-related public opinion incident (indecent assault on campus), but it did not have lasting impact; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious signs of increased application attention; no record of admission gaps in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; among enrollment majors, Electronic Information corresponds to Information and Communication Engineering/Electronic Science and Technology (not rated A), Vehicle Engineering corresponds to Mechanical Engineering (not rated A), Civil Engineering corresponds to Civil Engineering (not rated A), Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning corresponds to Geography (not rated A), overall advantageous disciplines have limited match with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information major has 'high heat recommendation' in society, a popular engineering direction currently, pushing rankings upward; Civil Engineering has 'divergent observation' to 'obvious discouragement', pulling rankings downward; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province has grown from about 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025, estimated at about 78,000 in 2026 (increase of about 15.7%), significantly increasing competition pressure, overall stable and slightly rising; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, in the same South China region as Hainan, with moderate geographical distance, high acceptance for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is very small (14 students/total university plan), belonging to small-scale enrollment institutions for other provinces, relatively limited impact from fluctuations in local candidate numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, rapid and continuous growth of Hainan candidate numbers (about +15.7%), and the upward push from Electronic Information major popularity, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to slightly shift backward. Predicted minimum ranking is about 5713, with a range of 5213–6213.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium Difficulty)
- Vehicle Engineering
- Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates near the lower bound of the predicted range (about 5213) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Electronic Information major, which is a high-heat engineering direction with good employment prospects; candidates in the middle range (about 5500–5900) are advised to target Tier 2 Vehicle Engineering and Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning as main directions, balancing safety; candidates near the upper bound (about 6200) are advised to use Tier 3 Civil Engineering as a safety option, which, despite lower social popularity, offers greater admission chances. Overall strategy: sprint for Tier 1, stabilize with Tier 2, and secure with Tier 3.
